notes: SHIP v1.14.281 - ASK TILE PHONE LAYOUT FIX + ASSISTANT ART V2 (per HANDOFF-ASK-PHONE-FIX-281, files 71.zip; supersedes the dead HANDOFF-ASSISTANT-V2-281 cache theory). TWO PARTS. (1) LAYOUT - the real bug, NOT cache: .apill was authored as a flex ROW (icon beside label) in .279. At 390px the askrow tile is 112.7px wide -> 88.7px content; a 56px icon + 12px gap left ~20.7px for 'Ask for assistance', which overflowed onto the icon. Misdiagnosed as stale art across .279/.280 (the mock was only ever rendered at 1080, where the tile is 338.7px and the row fits). The art HAD already updated - headless render-verify confirmed the new bust decoded at both ships. FIX (phone-first): base #pg-cmd .apill is now a COLUMN (flex-direction:column, centered, gap:6px); .av width:56px->100% height:72->56; .av img height:72->56; .ey (ASK PHANTOM eyebrow) display:none on phone; h3 15->12.5px + line-height:1.25 so the label wraps to 2 lines. The ROW layout is restored inside the existing @media(min-width:980px) block (flex-direction:row, .av 56x72, img 72, .ey display:block, h3 15px) - placed AFTER the base rules so equal-specificity wins on source order (same trap as the .164/.278 rule); no !important. Desktop renders exactly like .280. Ask tile may sit slightly taller than the 96px RESERVED tiles once the label wraps - expected. --violet PRESERVED throughout (my .280 token fix). (2) ART: added icons/phantom-ui-assistant-v2-256.webp (181x256, 15832 bytes; black chrome bust on a hexagonal plinth, cyan eye rings, lit AI badge; keyed + cwebp q82/alpha_q95/m6) under a NEW FILENAME; repointed the Ask src (:12680) and the sw.js precache entry (:77, replaced not added). RULE: raster assets are versioned by FILENAME, not the three-stamp (same as manifest-og-v2.png); next is -v3. phantom-ui-assistant-256.webp is ORPHANED BUT RETAINED (0 refs, dropped from precache, deliberately not deleted so a stale cache gets bytes not a 404). STANDING RULE recorded: Command-page specs get mocked at 390 FIRST, 1080 second (the Cold Aisle Filter - the phone is the target; mocking only at the convenient width shipped a design fault four times). VERIFIED LIVE (headless real-layout): 390px -> apill stacks column, eyebrow hidden, label wraps, no overlap, new bust decoded natW=181; 1080px -> row layout back, askrow on the 1080 column aligned with trow. Gates: node --check 4/0; sw.js OK; CSS braces balanced (+5 pairs, still even); CRLF 0 bare LF; three-stamp .280->.281. NOTE: prevVersion set to .280 (my .280 version.json left it at .279). John iPhone gate: Ask tile icon ABOVE label, both centered, NO overlap, NO eyebrow, label 'Ask for assistance' wraps 2 lines; new bust (hexagonal plinth, AI badge), no purple plate; tap Ask -> VA sheet on intent; RESERVED x2 inert; desktop >=980 row layout back on the 1080 column; drag through 980 = clean flip.
